functions.name: deploy-enterprise-rag
functions.description: Deploy Enterprise RAG to Azure — provision AI Search + OpenAI + Storage with AVM Bicep, configure indexes, deploy application, run smoke tests. Use when: deploy, provision, infrastructure, Azure, Bicep, azd, CI/CD.

functions.name: evaluate-enterprise-rag
functions.description: Evaluate Enterprise RAG quality — measure groundedness, relevance, coherence, fluency, content safety. Run evaluation pipeline, analyze gaps, set quality gates. Use when: evaluate, quality, groundedness, relevance, metrics, test, audit.
